shows.title: The Shawshank Redemption
shows.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

shows.title: The Godfather
shows.description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

shows.title: Forrest Gump
shows.description: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, the Watergate scandal and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

shows.title: Cast Away
shows.description: A FedEx employee must transform himself physically and emotionally to survive a crash landing on a deserted island.

shows.title: The Dark Knight
shows.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.
